name: Urgent Gantt Tasks Finishing Soon — Email Notifier
description: Read Gantt sheet, project to {priority, task_name, finish_date}, filter to Critical/High priority, augment with computed window_start/window_end/days_until_finish via transform/with_fields (W2 Expression: today + date_add + date_diff), filter to next 3 days (1 ≤ days_until_finish ≤ 3), sort by date, AI generate HTML table summary, send email. Exercises the full W2 expression-evaluator pipeline including date arithmetic, config refs, and locale-aware DD/MM parsing. Prerequisite: destination sheet has a header row (WP-26 workaround). Locked in WP-29 (locale-aware date parsing), WP-30 (config/ref {{}} wrap), and WP-31 (calendar-day date_diff) — all needed for this cascade.
